offer: For property managers processing 10-20 maintenance requests/month, inefficient tracking causes tenant dissatisfaction. We automate status updates instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem: Inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed updates and tenant dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows

Forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance requests and status updates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
